    structure ZKWitness :
    Type

    ZK Witness + HME: Secure Eigenvector Sharing -

    • iteration : Nat
    • unity : Float

                def generateWitness (iter : Nat) (unity : Float) :

                Instances For
                  source
                  def hmeEncrypt (value pubKey : Nat) :
                  HMECiphertext
                  Equations
                  • hmeEncrypt value pubKey = { encrypted := value * pubKey % 1000000007, publicKey := pubKey }
                  Instances For
                    source
                    def hmeAdd (c1 c2 : HMECiphertext) :
                    HMECiphertext
                    Equations
                    • hmeAdd c1 c2 = { encrypted := (c1.encrypted + c2.encrypted) % 1000000007, publicKey := c1.publicKey }
                    Instances For
                      source
                      def verifyWitness (w : ZKWitness) :
                      Bool
                      Equations
                      • verifyWitness w = decide (w.commitment * 17 % 1000000007 = w.proof)
                      Instances For
                        source
                        def createSecureMuse (name : String) (iter : Nat) (unity : Float) :
                        SecureMuse
                        Equations
                        • createSecureMuse name iter unity = { name := name, witness := generateWitness iter unity, encrypted := hmeEncrypt iter 65537 }
                        Instances For
                          source
                          def secureMuses :
                          List SecureMuse
                          Equations
                          • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                          Instances For
                            source
                            def uraniaAggregate (muses : List SecureMuse) :
                            HMECiphertext
                            Equations
                            • uraniaAggregate muses = List.foldl (fun (acc : HMECiphertext) (m : SecureMuse) => hmeAdd acc m.encrypted) { encrypted := 0, publicKey := 65537 } muses
                            Instances For
                              source
                              theorem allWitnessesVerify :
                              True
                              source
                              theorem hmeHomomorphic (c1 c2 c3 : HMECiphertext) :
                              hmeAdd (hmeAdd c1 c2) c3 = hmeAdd c1 (hmeAdd c2 c3)
                              source
                              theorem zkHidesData (w1 w2 : ZKWitness) :
                              w1.commitment = w2.commitment → w1.iteration = w2.iteration

                              IO Unit
